description_long: This is a modern bungalow with a single story, featuring a dark gray gable roof with skylights and a mix of white and dark exterior walls. The front facade includes a recessed entryway and a small overhang, while the rear showcases a large glass sliding door and a wooden pergola structure. The windows are arranged asymmetrically, with some grouped on the sides and others individually placed. The building sits on a rectangular base, suggesting a concrete or brick foundation. The materials appear to be a combination of brick, concrete, glass, wood, and metal, with a sleek and contemporary finish. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, functional outdoor space, and ample natural light.
description: A modern single-story bungalow with a dark gable roof, white and dark walls, skylights, and a wooden pergola at the rear. Features asymmetrical windows and a sleek, contemporary design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the recessed entryway, dark facade, and small overhang.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long white wall, skylights, and the start of the wooden pergola at the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the large glass sliding door and the full wooden pergola structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a dark wall, large window, and the pergola extending from the rear.
